contributing-md.description: Community contribution guide covering dev install, bug reports, feature proposals, and code style

bug-report-template.description: YAML issue form for bug reports with structured fields

feature-request-template.description: YAML issue form for feature requests with structured fields

template-config.description: Template chooser configuration for GitHub issue creation

pr-template.description: Pull request template with what/why/testing checklist

package-json-fields.description: Added repository and homepage fields pointing to pragnition/RAPID

yaml-boolean-safety.description: All YAML template boolean values must be quoted strings, not bare yes/no, to prevent silent parsing breakage

public-repo-required.description: GitHub YAML issue forms only work on public repositories; templates must gracefully degrade to Markdown forms on private repos

no-nonsense-tone.description: CONTRIBUTING.md uses brief, direct tone matching RAPID's existing documentation style -- no corporate boilerplate

definition.scope: Create all community-facing GitHub infrastructure: CONTRIBUTING.md, YAML issue templates (bug report, feature request, config), PR template, and package.json metadata fields.

tasks.description: Create CONTRIBUTING.md with dev install, bug reports, feature proposals, code style sections
tasks.acceptance: Concise, no-boilerplate guide matching RAPID's doc style
Valid YAML, all booleans quoted, structured fields
Valid YAML, all booleans quoted, structured fields

tasks.description: Create PR template with what/why/testing checklist
Add repository and homepage fields to package.json

acceptance: All community files exist and are valid
YAML forms render correctly on GitHub
package.json has repository and homepage fields
